name: neo4j
description: Operate a Neo4j graph database with Cypher over the HTTP transactional API or cypher-shell.

settings.name: Username
settings.description: Neo4j username used for HTTP Basic authentication and cypher-shell.

settings.name: Password
settings.description: Neo4j password used for HTTP Basic authentication and cypher-shell.

settings.name: HTTP URL
settings.description: Neo4j HTTP transactional API base URL, usually http://host:7474. Recommended for curl-based workflows.

settings.name: Bolt URL
settings.description: Optional Neo4j Bolt URL, usually bolt://host:7687. Used by cypher-shell and as a fallback to derive the default HTTP URL.

settings.name: Database
settings.description: Neo4j database name for transactional API calls. Default: neo4j.
